description: GlobalConnect Solutions is transitioning its 'Customer Support' team from the 'Omaha Call Center' to a Work-From-Home (WFH) model. As an End User Computing Engineer, execute the hardware exchange for Alice Adams, Bob Baker, and Carol Clark in Snipe-IT. Check in their Dell Wyse 3040 Thin Clients (tags: TC-001, TC-002, TC-003), update those assets' status to 'Retired' with the note 'WFH Migration', and update the users' profiles to the 'Remote/WFH' location. Issue one 'Dell Latitude 5430' laptop (from tags: LAP-WFH-001, LAP-WFH-002, or LAP-WFH-003) and one 'Jabra Evolve2 65' headset accessory to each of the three users.
